name: solnest-carousel-sniper
description: Snipe any Airbnb, VRBO listing, or photo set into a magazine-grade Instagram carousel. Brand-agnostic. Drag this file into Claude Code and say 'set this up' to auto-install (see SETUP.md). Then /solnest-carousel, /solnest-carousel-setup, or /solnest-carousel-demo any time.
